query:
SELECT id, status, errorMessage, finalVideoUrl IS NOT NULL as hasFinalVideo, updatedAt FROM musicVideoJobs WHERE id = 510098;
SELECT status, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM musicVideoScenes WHERE jobId = 510098 GROUP BY status;
